defs: State or quality of being glad; pleasure; joyful satisfaction; cheerfulness.
quotes: They . . . did eat their meat with gladness and singleness of heart.
The Jews had joy and gladness, a feast and a good day.
notes: ☞ Gladness is rarely or never equivalent to mirth, merriment, gayety, and triumph, and it usually expresses less than delight. It sometimes expresses great joy.
